refactor(linter): improve nextjs/no-typos rule

fix(oxfmt): Normalize path delimiter on Windows

release(oxfmt): v0.4.0
release(oxlint): v1.22.0
fix(linter): fix compile error with test target
fix(oxlint): bundle esquery
test(napi/parser): disable raw transfer tests on `antd.js` fixture
feat(linter/oxc): implement `branches-sharing-code`
release(oxlint): v1.21.0
fix(linter/jsx-handler-name): improve handler name position in error messages
refactor(linter/language_server): move all lsp relevant code to `oxc_language_server` crate
refactor(linter/language_server): `oxc_linter::TsgoLinter::run_source` returns `Message`
fix(language_server): use the first Span of the message as the primary Diagnostic range
fix(linter/plugins): fix error messages
feat(linter/plugins): support selectors DSL
refactor(ast_tools): refactor generating visitor type files
refactor(linter/plugins): split adding visit function to compiler visitor into multiple functions
refactor(linter/plugins): track ancestors while walking AST
refactor(linter/plugins): do not lazy-load visitor keys
refactor(linter/plugins): allow nullish values as `message` or `messageId`
refactor(linter/plugins): remove default value from `Context` constructor
perf(linter/plugins): small perf optimizations
feat(linter/plugins): support interpolation in normal diagnostic `message`
perf(linter/plugins): avoid private methods
test(napi/parser): skip slow test
test(linter/plugins): clarify tests for message placeholders
feat(linter/plugins): support placeholders in messageIds
feat(linter/plugins): support `messageId`s
fix(oxlint): ignore fixtures dir for vitest
feat(linter): add `vue/require-default-export` rule
feat(linter): add `vue/no-import-compiler-macros` rule
test(napi/parser): fix and clarify exclude tests logic
ci(napi): remove redundant step from workflow + add comment
feat(ci): run napi tests on windows
perf(parser): cache cur_kind() to eliminate redundant calls
perf(parser): use range checks for is_any_keyword() and is_number()
perf(parser): inline escaped keyword check in advance()
fix(oxlint): normalize path separators in snapshot tests
test(oxlint): update `.gitattributes` to force `lf` line endings
fix(language_server): ignore JS plugins
perf(parser): add separate token kinds for BigInt literals
fix(linter/plugins): do not call `before` hook if empty visitor
perf(parser): cache `has_separator()` result in literal parsing
refactor(oxlint): use `vitest`s built in file snapshot comparison
fix(package.json): fix quotes for windows compat
feat(napi/playground): call `with_private_member_mappings()` for private class member mangling
feat(tasks/compat_data): add custom compat data for export namespace from
perf(parser): optimize comment annotation parsing
feat(formatter/sort-imports): Implement options.ignoreCase: bool
test(oxfmt): Update conformance, follow up #20954
fix(formatter): resolve pending space in fits measurer before expanded-mode early exit
perf(ast_tools): introduce `StructsMut` iterator and use it where possible
fix(lsp): prevent corrupted autofix output from overlapping text edits
fix(linter/no-array-index-key): move span to `key` property

perf(ast_tools): introduce `Structs` iterator and use it where possible
refactor(ast_tools): simplify `AstKind` generator
refactor(ast_tools): simplify `StructsAndEnums` iterator
refactor(ast_visit): remove special case for `BindingRestElement` from `Utf8ToUtf16Converter`
feat(oxlint): support allow option for prefer-promise-reject-errors
refactor(ast): simplify ESTree serialization of `Ident`
fix(ast_tools): correct error message and doc comment

feat(linter/consistent-return): move rule from nursery to suspicious
feat(linter/no-unnecessary-type-conversion): move rule from nursery to suspicious
feat(linter/dot-notation): move rule from nursery to style
feat(linter/consistent-type-exports): move rule from nursery to style
fix(linter): allow default-import barrels in import/named
feat(linter/unicorn): implement switch-case-break-position
